title: corniola tenella
intro: Corniola tenella, commonly known as Wild Bergamot, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. It is valued for its health benefits, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues and skin conditions. The therapeutic actions of Corniola tenella include its ability to soothe anxiety, promote relaxation, and support respiratory health. The bioactive constituents of this plant include bergamotene, linalool, and limonene, which contribute to its therapeutic effects.
